title: Software Update - DFU - Headset and Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings - Update All
scenario: DFU blocked with low battery warning popup when headset or charge case battery is below 5% and not plugged into power
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
3. Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
4. Ensure the headset and/or charge case battery is below 5% and NOT connected to a charger.
5. Go to the Software Update tab.
7. Observe the popup message displayed on screen.
expected: A popup appears stating: "Update currently not available, please try back later". The DFU should not proceed.
